# Van Sale API
# autogenerated with an llm. May contain errors
A production-ready Express.js REST API that bridges a mobile van-sale client to **Odoo 17** via XML-RPC. Built as a learning project.

## Overview

```
Mobile App  ──▶  Van Sale API  ──▶  Odoo 17 (XML-RPC)
                     │
                     ├── SQLite (local users)
                     ├── Redis  (Bull retry queue)
                     └── node-cache (in-memory Odoo data cache)
```

## Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Framework | Express.js (CommonJS) |
| Odoo integration | `xmlrpc` — `execute_kw` over XML-RPC 2 |
| Auth | JWT access + refresh tokens, bcryptjs, better-sqlite3 |
| RBAC | `admin`, `salesman` roles |
| Config validation | Joi |
| Retry queue | Bull + ioredis (Redis) |
| Cache | node-cache (in-memory) |
| Logging | Winston |
| Security | helmet, cors, express-rate-limit |

---

## Project Structure

```
van-sale-api/
├── src/
│   ├── config/
│   │   ├── index.js          # Joi env validation — validates all vars on boot
│   │   ├── odoo.js           # xmlrpc client factory (common + object clients)
│   │   └── db.js             # better-sqlite3 singleton + inline migrations
│   ├── middleware/
│   │   ├── auth.js           # JWT verify → attach req.user, 401 on failure
│   │   ├── rbac.js           # requireRole(...roles) factory → 403 on mismatch
│   │   ├── rateLimiter.js    # express-rate-limit (stricter on /auth routes)
│   │   ├── cors.js           # allowlist in prod, open in dev
│   │   └── errorHandler.js   # global catch-all + 404, logs via winston
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── auth.routes.js    # POST /login  POST /refresh  POST /logout
│   │   ├── sales.routes.js   # GET / POST / GET /:id  PUT /:id
│   │   ├── customers.routes.js
│   │   ├── products.routes.js  # cached 5 min via node-cache
│   │   ├── stock.routes.js
│   │   └── sync.routes.js    # POST /sync — offline ops → Bull jobs
│   ├── services/
│   │   ├── odoo.service.js   # searchRead / create / write / unlink wrappers
│   │   ├── auth.service.js   # register, login, refresh, logout, findById
│   │   └── queue.service.js  # Bull queue setup, addJob with exponential backoff
│   ├── mappers/
│   │   ├── sale.mapper.js    # sale.order ↔ API shape
│   │   ├── partner.mapper.js # res.partner ↔ API shape
│   │   └── product.mapper.js # product.product → API shape (read-only)
│   ├── jobs/
│   │   └── syncProcessor.js  # Bull worker: CREATE_SALE_ORDER, UPDATE_SALE_ORDER, CREATE_CUSTOMER
│   ├── utils/
│   │   ├── logger.js         # winston (console + file, JSON in production)
│   │   ├── cache.js          # node-cache wrapper: get / set / del / flush
│   │   └── response.js       # success(res, data) / error(res, msg) envelope
│   └── app.js                # helmet, cors, json, rateLimiter, routes, errorHandler
└── server.js                 # listen on PORT, graceful shutdown (SIGTERM/SIGINT)
```

---

## Environment Variables

Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and fill in the values.

```env
PORT=4000
NODE_ENV=development
LOG_LEVEL=debug

# Odoo 17
ODOO_URL=https://your-instance.odoo.com
ODOO_DB=your_db
ODOO_USER=admin@example.com
ODOO_PASSWORD=your_password

# JWT
JWT_SECRET=change_me_in_prod
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=8h
REFRESH_SECRET=change_me_refresh
REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN=7d

# CORS — comma-separated origins
CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,https://your-app.com

# SQLite
DB_PATH=./data/vansale.db

# Redis (required for Bull queue)
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# Rate limiting
RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=60000
RATE_LIMIT_MAX=100
```

---

## API Routes

All routes are prefixed `/api`.

### Auth — `/api/auth`

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/login` | — | Issue access + refresh tokens |
| POST | `/refresh` | — | Exchange refresh token for new access token |
| POST | `/logout` | Bearer | Invalidate refresh token |

### Sales — `/api/sales`

| Method | Path | Roles | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | admin, salesman | List sale orders |
| POST | `/` | admin, salesman | Create sale order |
| GET | `/:id` | admin, salesman | Get sale order |
| PUT | `/:id` | admin, salesman | Update sale order |

### Customers — `/api/customers`

| Method | Path | Roles | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | admin, salesman | List customers |
| GET | `/:id` | admin, salesman | Get customer |
| POST | `/` | admin, salesman | Create customer |

### Products — `/api/products`

| Method | Path | Roles | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | admin, salesman | List products (cached 5 min) |
| GET | `/:id` | admin, salesman | Get product (cached 5 min) |

### Stock — `/api/stock`

| Method | Path | Roles | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | admin, salesman | Stock on hand by location |

### Sync — `/api/sync`

| Method | Path | Roles | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| POST | `/sync` | admin, salesman | Submit offline operations → returns Bull job IDs |

**Sync payload shape:**
```json
{
  "operations": [
    { "type": "CREATE_SALE_ORDER", "payload": { ... } },
    { "type": "CREATE_CUSTOMER",   "payload": { ... } }
  ]
}
```

Supported job types: `CREATE_SALE_ORDER`, `UPDATE_SALE_ORDER`, `CREATE_CUSTOMER`

---

## Auth Flow

```
POST /api/auth/login
  body: { email, password }
  ──▶ bcrypt compare against local users table
  ◀── { accessToken, refreshToken, user }

GET /api/sales  (protected)
  header: Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>
  ──▶ auth middleware verifies JWT → req.user
  ──▶ rbac middleware checks role
  ◀── data from Odoo via XML-RPC
```

Access tokens expire per `JWT_EXPIRES_IN`. Use `POST /api/auth/refresh` with the refresh token to get a new one without re-login.

---

## Retry Queue

Offline operations submitted via `/api/sync` are enqueued into a Bull queue (`van-sale-sync`) backed by Redis.

- **Retries:** 5 attempts with exponential backoff (base delay 2 s)
- **Worker:** `src/jobs/syncProcessor.js` processes each job type against Odoo
- **On exhaustion:** job is marked `failed` and logged — no silent drops

---

## Database Schema

```sql
-- Local users (independent of Odoo)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id           TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name         TEXT NOT NULL,
  email        TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  role         TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(role IN ('admin','salesman')),
  odoo_uid     INTEGER,          -- optional link to Odoo user
  is_active    INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
  created_at   TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

-- Refresh token store
CREATE TABLE refresh_tokens (
  id         TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id    TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  token_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  expires_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
```

| Phase | Scope | Depends on |
|-------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | Foundation & Config | — |
| 2 | Database & Auth Service | Phase 1 |
| 3 | Middleware | Phase 2 |
| 4 | Odoo Service & Mappers | Phase 1 |
| 5 | Queue & Jobs | Phase 1 |
| 6 | Routes | Phases 2–5 |
| 7 | App Assembly | All |

---

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] `npm install` — no errors
- [ ] `node -e "require('./src/config/index.js')"` — throws on missing required env vars
- [ ] `npm run dev` — starts on PORT 4000
- [ ] `POST /api/auth/login` — returns `accessToken` + `refreshToken`
- [ ] `GET /api/products` with Bearer token — Odoo data or `502` (never `500`) if Odoo unreachable
- [ ] `POST /api/sync` — returns Bull job IDs
- [ ] Repeated login beyond rate limit — `429`
- [ ] No token on protected route — `401`
- [ ] Wrong role on restricted route — `403`

---

## Scripts

```bash
npm run dev     # nodemon server.js
npm start       # node server.js
npm test        # jest
```
